creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
So, we took a perfectly working system and put the problem in the hands of every Makefile where X11 is an option for the port[0], or every admin that doesn't know this, and deselects X11 support in a port that might pull in other ports without setting a @nox11 flavor of a seemingly unrelated port in make.conf.

If it's a "wontfix", we just have to live with a regression here.

[0]: graphics/pecl-imagick-im7/Makefile:
X11_USES?= magick:7
X11_USES_OFF?= magick:7,nox11
